evals.prompt: Write a Prometheus alert rule that fires if the error rate for our 'payment-service' goes above 1% for 5 minutes.
evals.expected_output: Prometheus alert rule YAML for high error rate.
expectations: Outputs valid YAML format for Prometheus rules
Includes a PromQL expression calculating error rate (errors / total)
Includes severity labels (e.g., critical) and actionable annotations (runbook URL)

evals.prompt: Create an SLO burn rate alert for a 99.9% availability target. Alert if we consume 5% of the monthly budget in 1 hour.
evals.expected_output: Prometheus alert rule for fast SLO burn rate.
expectations: Calculates the correct burn rate multiplier (14.4x for 1 hour)
Uses a 1-hour window in the PromQL expression
Alerts on the burn rate threshold being exceeded
Explains the math behind the alert
